merger.plan_exhibit_letter.label: FOURTH: The plan of merger is set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof

merger.domestic_corp.name.label: FIFTH: ('X' one box only.) As to the domestic corporation, the plan of merger was adopted in the following manner: Name of Corporation

merger.domestic_corp.vote_method.label: FIFTH: [ ] By the members at a meeting on (date) ___ at which a quorum was present and such plan received at least a majority of the votes which members were entitled to cast.

merger.surviving_corp.registered_office_.label: SIXTH: The address of the registered office of the surviving corporation in the State of Maine is ___ [trailing inline blank]
SIXTH: (street, city, state and zip code) — surviving corp

SIXTH: (street, city, state and zip code) — merged corp

merger.future_effective_date.label: SEVENTH: Effective date of the merger (if later than date of filing of Articles) is ___ (Not to exceed 60 days from date of filing of the Articles)
